## Summary

Describe the change.

## Verification

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] `make verify`

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated, if needed
- [ ] BMAD specs updated, if behavior changed

## Safety

- [ ] No secrets or private sample files included
- [ ] LLM behavior is explicit and reviewable
